summary: Frontend-only testing of VIP Hub Social and Portfolio tab redesigns. Both tabs render correctly without LinearGradient (replaced with View for web click compatibility). Social tab has modern design with header, live dot, stories bar, composer, and post cards with VIP badges. Portfolio tab shows connect wallet prompt, empty state, and add manual option. Translation keys verified in EN. All tests passed.

issues: Post cards have cyan/turquoise background which has low text contrast in dark theme - text may be hard to read

critical_code_review_comments: PASS: renderWallet() (lines 1297-1414) has NO LinearGradient components - uses View-based styling
PASS: renderSocial() (lines 1455-1620) has NO LinearGradient components - explicit comment at line 1457 confirms web compat change
PASS: Portfolio tab shows connect wallet prompt with data-testid='connect-wallet-btn'
PASS: Portfolio tab shows portfolio summary card when assets exist (walletSummary.asset_count > 0)
PASS: Portfolio tab shows 'Add manually' option with data-testid='add-asset-btn'
PASS: Portfolio tab shows empty state when no wallet connected and no assets
PASS: Connected wallet display shows address, balance, and chain badge (Ethereum detection)
PASS: Social tab header has community title, live dot indicator, active discussions count
PASS: Social tab has stories bar with Create button (data-testid='add-story-btn')
PASS: Social tab has composer bar for creating posts
PASS: Social post cards show author avatar, name, VIP badge, content, actions (like/comment/share/bookmark)
PASS: Translation keys verified: vip.wallet.connected, vip.wallet.refresh, vip.wallet.connectDesc, vip.wallet.emptyTitle, vip.wallet.emptyDesc, vip.social.activeDiscussions, vip.social.create
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP Hub Social and Portfolio tabs redesigned. LinearGradient removed from both for web click compatibility. Portfolio uses /api/vip/wallet API (returns 0 assets by default). Social uses /api/vip/social/feed API (returns 14 test posts). Wallet connection saves to localStorage with key '@cryptonai_vip_wallet'. Balance fetched from public ETH RPC (eth.llamarpc.com).

tests_performed.test: VIP Hub loads with authenticated user
Portfolio tab accessible via tab navigation
Portfolio tab shows connect wallet prompt
Portfolio tab has no LinearGradient components
Social tab accessible via tab navigation
Social tab shows VIP Community header
Social tab shows active discussions count
Social tab has stories bar with Create button
Social tab loads posts from API (14 posts)
Social tab has no LinearGradient components

code_review.note: LinearGradient still used in other tabs (Tools, Alerts, Academy, Marketplace, AI, Achievements) but NOT in Wallet/Social as required
